## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open repository '...'
2. Select worktree '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 15.5 -->
- GitBench version: <!-- from package.json or the About dialog -->
- `git --version`: <!-- paste output -->

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console output. GitBench drives the system `git`
CLI, so the exact `git` command and its error (if any) is especially useful.

## Additional context

Were you viewing the main worktree or a linked one? Anything else relevant.
